notable_excerpts: We will continue to advance renewable and energy storage in a calibrated manner to enhance system flexibility and portfolio balance.

In the first 9 months of FY '26, our station co-fired 9.68 lakh metric tonnes of biomass, more than double the 4.29 lakhs metric tonnes used in the same period last year, supporting sustainability objectives.
NTPC commissioned 3-MWh vanadium redox flow battery pilot project, which is India's first MWh scale long-duration energy storage system.
We have also commissioned 3.7 MW solar project at Chushul, which is in Ladakh, which is designed for providing 24X7 carbon-free electricity to the Indian Army.

We have received several recognitions such as the Organization leading the Net Zero building movement in India at the Indian Green Building Council’s- IGBC - Green Champions Award, SHRM HR Excellence Award in public sector category.
We are improving our operational and maintenance practices continuously to reduce under-recoveries and maximum gains.
MSCI ESG ratings upgraded NTPC to a B rating from CCC, marking a significant improvement in its ESG assessment after nearly 10 years due to our sustained initiatives.

The government has recently legislated Sustainable Harnessing and Advancement of Nuclear energy for Transforming India, SHANTI Nuclear Act, which positions nuclear power as a key pillar of India's long-term baseload energy strategy.

chain_of_thought: NTPC has demonstrated strong environmental initiatives with significant renewable energy and energy storage projects. Social aspects are addressed through community engagement and employee recognition, though more specific details could enhance the score. Governance is robust with improved ESG ratings and strategic legislative support, but could benefit from more detailed disclosures on board independence and ethics.
strengths: Strong focus on renewable energy and energy storage.
Recognition for community and employee initiatives.
weaknesses: Limited specific details on social initiatives.
Governance disclosures could be more detailed.
